name: llm-wiki
description: Ingest sources into a structured LLM wiki with query and lint workflows.

interface.shortDescription: Ingest, query, and lint structured markdown knowledge bases
interface.longDescription: Use LLM Wiki to capture files, URLs, YouTube videos, and pasted text into a structured markdown wiki, then query and lint it with citation discipline.
defaultPrompt: Ingest this source into my LLM wiki.
Query my LLM wiki about this topic.
Lint my LLM wiki and fix safe issues.
